rows.label: qev085910_MSG0001
rows.name:
Welcome to Army Pizza! Are
you here to buy a pizza?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085910_MSG0002
rows.name:
...What's that? You want ten pizzas delivered?
Then for 10,000G, we'll deliver our piping
hot pizzas anywhere you need them![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085910_JNK0010
rows.name: Buy

rows.label: qev085910_SEL0011
rows.name: Purchase the pizzas for 10,000G.

rows.label: qev085910_JNK0020
rows.name: Don't buy

rows.label: qev085910_SEL0021
rows.name: Decline, saying you will pass.

rows.label: qev085910_MSG0003
rows.name:
Thanks for your patronage! So we just
need to deliver the pizzas to the
Ma-non artisan named Jeshero, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085910_MSG0009
rows.name:
Leave it to me! I'll get them delivered
right away before they go cold![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085910_MSG0004
rows.name:
Hey, hey, not eating my pizza is
like missing out on more than half
the joys in life, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085910_MSG0011
rows.name:
...Wait, huh? Hey, hey, you
don't have enough money![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085910_MSG0012
rows.name:
If you want to eat our pizza, gather
up the full 10,000G and come back![ST:wait ]
